title: Green Golden Apple
description: This Texture pack changes the golden apple plus notch apple to be a green apple drawing thats HD
body:
### **_Yall Should Visit my Youtube Channel!_**

_https://www.youtube.com/@AjarSpider77221YT_

### _**Explaination**_


The golden Apple Texture pack will show up as not the right version but it will still work, dunno why it won't just fix itself even in the right format lol. This is a custom Made Golden Apple Texture pack so I hope yall enjoy the look of this green apple, also it applies to both regular and Notch apples.
